name: Weather Dashboard
label: Frontend
summary: A weather dashboard interface focused on presenting forecasts and key climate details in a clean, simple layout.
description: A lightweight front-end project centered on weather information, interface clarity, and responsive presentation.
imageAlt: Preview image for the Weather Dashboard project.

name: Virtual Assistant
label: JavaScript App
summary: A browser-based virtual assistant project exploring interactive commands, front-end logic, and conversational UI ideas.
description: Built as a JavaScript assistant experience that experiments with user interaction and lightweight automation on the web.
imageAlt: Preview image for the Virtual Assistant project.

name: Online Movie Ticket Booking System
label: Booking System
summary: A movie ticket booking project built around a cinema-style reservation flow, ticketing logic, and user-friendly UI structure.
description: Designed to explore the experience of browsing movies, selecting seats, and moving through an end-to-end booking flow.
imageAlt: Preview image for the Online Movie Ticket Booking System project.

name: Tiffin Service App
label: Mobile App
summary: An Android app for ordering home-cooked tiffin meals with authentication, meal browsing, and cart management.
description: Built with Kotlin, Android Jetpack, and Firebase to support a practical food-ordering flow on mobile devices.
imageAlt: Preview image for the Tiffin Service App project.

name: Multiple Diseases Prediction System
label: ML App
summary: A machine learning web app that predicts multiple diseases from medical inputs with confidence-focused feedback.
description: Built with Streamlit to present Diabetes, Heart Disease, and Parkinson's predictions in a practical experimentation interface.
imageAlt: Preview image for the Multiple Diseases Prediction System project.
